headline: Q4 Earnings Highlights: Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) Vs The Rest Of The Advertising & Marketing Services Stocks
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Omnicom Group (NYSE:OMC) and the best and worst performers in the advertising & marketing services industry.
